title: a great analysis, and your usage of the direct quotes from the story provide exc
content:
a great analysis, and your usage of the direct quotes from the story provide excellent evidence to back up your claims.

from Week 5 Discussion
Feb 9, 2025 6:00PM
Daniel Escobar
Hi Brandon,

Your analysis of the story was very interesting and unique! It definitely offered me a different perspective as to what I was reading. After reading over your response, you have made me look at the story differently. With the usage of symbolism, including the name Phoenix which is symbolic of "rising from the ashes" or something along the lines of inspiration, I went into my discussion thinking the story (although sad) had positive and uplifting messages. However, upon reading your analysis I am tempted to rethink my way of reading the story. You make a very good point as to her age playing a major factor in how one may view the themes of a story. There are certain clues in the story as you mentioned that point to her being at the end of her life. I think it is very easy to overlook that when you are focusing on the themes of perseverance and sacrifice. Your analysis of the sweet gum tree was also an interesting one, and one that I myself had overlooked. Overall your response was not only thought provoking, but offered a very different perspective from some of the other discussions I've read, as well as a different perspective from my own interpretation of the stor
